description: black to kill all of the white stones. Unknown source seen on KGS.
sgf:
(;
AW [ca][cb][bc][cd][ae][ce][bf]
AB [ba][da][ab][db][dc][dd][de][cf][ag][bg][cg]
C[black to kill all of the stones without ko.]
     (;B[bb] ;W[cc]
          (;B[af]
               (;W[be] C[CHOICE]
                    (;B[ac] C[RIGHT white dies.])
                    (;B[ad] C[RIGHT white dies.])
                    (;B[bd] ;W[ad] C[seki.])
               )
               (;W[ac] ;B[be] ;W[aa] ;B[bb] C[RIGHT CHOICE white dies.])
               (;W[bd] ;B[ac] C[RIGHT CHOICE white dies.])
               (;W[ad] ;B[be] C[RIGHT CHOICE white dies.])
          )
          (;B[ac] ;W[ad]
               (;B[be] ;W[aa]
                    (;B[af] ;W[ab] C[white lives.])
                    (;B[bb] ;W[af] C[white lives.])
                    (;B[ab] ;W[bb] ;B[ba] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
               )
               (;B[bd] ;W[be] ;B[af] ;W[aa] ;B[ab] ;W[ba] C[white lives.])
          )
          (;B[be] ;W[bd]
               (;B[af] ;W[ac] ;B[be] ;W[aa] ;B[bb] ;W[bf] C[ko. black can do better.])
               (;B[ac] ; W[af] C[seki.])
          )
     )


     (;B[cc] ;W[bb]
          (;B[bd] ;W[aa] C[ko. black can do better.])
          (;B[aa] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
     )
     (;B[bd] ;W[cc]
          (;B[ac] ;W[ad] ;B[af] ;W[be] C[seki.])
          (;B[af] ;W[be] ;B[ac] ;W[ad] C[seki.])
          (;B[be] ;W[ad]
               (;B[af] ;W[be] ;B[ac] C[seki.])
               (;B[be] ;W[af]
                    (;B[ac] ;W[bd] C[seki.])
                    (;B[bb] C[white tenuki. seki.])
               )
          )
          (;B[bb] ;W[ac]
               (;B[af] ;W[aa] ;B[be] ;W[bb] C[white lives.])
               (;B[be]
                    (;W[ad] C[CHOICE]
                         (;B[be] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
                         (;B[af] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
                    )
                    (;W[aa] C[CHOICE]
                         (;B[af] ;W[bb] C[white lives.])
                         (;B[bb] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
                    )
               )
          )
     )
     (;B[af] ;W[bb]
          (;B[ac] ;W[ad]
               (;B[be] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
               (;B[bd] ;W[be] C[white lives.])
          )
          (;B[be] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
          (;B[aa] ;W[be] C[white lives.])
     )     
     (;B[be] ;W[bb] 
          (;B[aa] ;W[ac]
               (;B[aa] ;W[bd] C[white lives.])
               (;B[af] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
          )
          (;B[af] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
          (;B[cc] ;W[bd]
               (;B[ac] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
               (;B[af] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
          )
     )
     (;B[ac] ;W[bb]
          (;B[bd] ;W[aa] C[ko. black can do better.])
          (;B[aa] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
          (;B[be] ;W[bd] ;B[af] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
          (;B[af] ;W[ad] ;B[be] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
